studySet.b: I am able to do all things in Him who empowers me.
Put on the whole armor of God that you may be able to stand against the stratagems of the devil.
Heaven and earth will pass away, but My words shall by no means pass away.
But I have one thing against you, that you have left your first love.
Sanctify them in the truth. Your word is truth.
For where there are two or three gathered into My name, there am I in their midst.
As You have sent Me into the world, I also have sent them into the world
For our wrestling is not against blood and flesh but against the rulers, against the authorities, against the world-rulers of this darkness, against the spiritual forces of evil in the heavenlies.
Jesus wept.
I am the vine; you are the branches. He who abides in Me and I in him, he bears much fruit; for apart from Me you can do nothing.

I am crucified with Christ; and it is no longer I who live, but it is Christ who lives in me; and the life which I now live in the flesh I live in faith, the faith of the Son of God, who loved me and gave Himself up for me.
If the world hates you, know that it has hated Me before you.
But He answered and said, It is written, "Man shall not live on bread alone, but on every word that proceeds out through the mouth of God."
But if Christ is in you, though the body is dead because of sin, the spirit is life because of righteousness.
For God so loved the world that He gave His only begotten Son, that everyone who believes into Him would not perish, but would have eternal life.
I do not ask that You would take them out of the world, but that You would keep them out of the hands of the evil one.
Nor to give heed to myths and unending genealogies, which produce questionings rather than God's economy, which is in faith.
Indeed, I am doing a new thing; It will now spring forth; Do you not know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, Rivers in the desert.
O God, do not keep silent; Do not be quiet, and do not be still, O God.
But I say to you, Love your enemies, and pray for those who persecute you,
I tell you that in the same way there will be more joy in heaven over one sinner repenting than over ninety-nine righteous persons who have no need of repentance.
And suddenly, when they looked around, they no longer saw anyone, but Jesus only with them.
And we know that all things work together for good to those who love God, to those who are called according to His purpose.
That Christ may make His home in your hearts through faith, that you, being rooted and grounded in love,
And there are also many other things which Jesus did, which, if they were written one by one, I suppose that not even the world itself could contain the books written.
I anticipated the dawn and cried out; / I hoped in Your words.
But you shall receive power when the Holy Spirit comes upon you, and you shall be My witnesses both in Jerusalem and in all Judea and Samaria and unto the uttermost part of the earth.
For you will be a witness to Him unto all men of the things which you have seen and heard.

Only, conduct yourselves in a manner worthy of the gospel of Christ, that whether coming and seeing you or being absent, I may hear of the things concerning you, that you stand firm in one spirit, with one soul striving together along with the faith of the gospel,
For which I was appointed a herald and an apostle (I speak the truth; I do not lie), a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
And He said to them, Come after Me, and I will make you fishers of men.
For if I preach the gospel, I have no boast, for necessity is laid upon me; for woe to me if I do not preach the gospel.
On behalf of Christ then we are ambassadors, as God entreats you through us; we beseech you on behalf of Christ, Be reconciled to God.
For though you have ten thousand guides in Christ, yet you do not have many fathers; for in Christ Jesus I have begotten you through the gospel.

That I might be a minister of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles, a laboring priest of the gospel of God, in order that the offering of the Gentiles might be acceptable, having been sanctified in the Holy Spirit.
Abide in Me and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself unless it abides in the vine, so neither can you unless you abide in Me.
I am the vine; you are the branches. He who abides in Me and I in him, he bears much fruit; for apart from Me you can do nothing.
You did not choose Me, but I chose you, and I set you that you should go forth and bear fruit and that your fruit should remain, that whatever you ask the Father in My name, He may give you.
And I saw the holy city, New Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, prepared as a bride adorned for her husband.
Go therefore and disciple all the nations, baptizing them into the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,
Blessed are those who wash their robes that they may have right to the tree of life and may enter by the gates into the city.
